prompt: I've staged a new in-memory cache layer across a few files. Make a commit.
assertions: Used the ✨ emoji (acceptable: a feat alternate such as 🏗️).
Included a body (multi-file change over ~10 lines) explaining the why, separated from the subject by a blank line.
Subject is imperative, no trailing period, ≤72 chars.
Committed the change on the non-main branch (feat/cache-layer).
